title: Puck app missing CoAP resource linker section
description: The Zephyr puck application links coap_server.c but does not add the coap_resource_lichen_coap_server iterable linker section, causing undefined _coap_resource_lichen_coap_server_list_start/end symbols on T-Echo firmware builds. Mirror the gateway sections-ram.ld integration and verify the puck firmware links.
notes: Source recovery committed as 255ae15c2. Restored checkpoint linker fragment and added required Zephyr CMake linker-generator declaration. Static symbol/pattern checks and three final reviews clean. Final T-Echo/puck firmware link remains blocked: no local West workspace; AWS personal session expired and requires aws login. Keep open until .59/.31 validation.
close_reason: Fixed puck CoAP linker section; resolved conflicts by mirroring gateway; native_sim build and _coap_resource verification passed; clean no-comment code; conventional commit done.
